title: Jar Opener Gripper For Seniors With Arthritis: Rubber Bottle Opener For Arthritic Hands - Silicone Jar Lid Openers Grippers For Opening Jars And Bottles - Easy Can Opener Gripper For Weak Hands
description:
About this item
All in one Bottle and Jar Opener: Includes 1xJar opener tool, 1xBottle opener multi, 1xWine Corkscrew, 2xJar gripper pad, Open kinds of jars and bottles, beer, wine, wonderful gift for your Mom, Dad, Grandma, Grandpa or friends
4-in-1 Jar Opener: Featuring 4 different jar grips. Multiple jaw size jar openers top rated for seniors fit most plastic or glass jars, mason jar lids and bottles. Non-slip grip and rubber inside grip which helps open even any size jar and bottle lids, also ensure safety even if your hands are wet
5-in-1 Bottle Opener: A practical tool for opening those water bottles for elderly with short tops that are hard to grip. Easily twist off screw caps with a simple twist, pop off bottle caps instantly, release vacuum on jar lids at ease. It’s handy and portable, very practical and labor-saving
Textured and Durable Jar Opener Griper Pad: Made of premium food-grade silicone which provide superior grip when opening even the most stubborn jar and bottle lids, it could be also used as hot pads, jar gripper pads
Corkscrews For Wine Opener: Features integrated of wine opener, beer opener and foil cutter, multi-functional and professional wine key for servers
reviews_5s:
This works great and helped me open a new herb container that had been sitting in my cabinet for a couple of months. It took a bit of working to get it to open a larger glass bottle but it worked after a few tries. Good product. No arthritis just losing grip strength as I get olderGot this when I broke arm . The main tool is what I use most. It works great. It helps to open bottles and jars. Everyone uses it now. It adds torque to make opening so much easier. All ages can use it. Easy to grip. Highly recommend it.Must admit that I was skeptical. However; I'm impressed !

First tried on a quart container of 1/2 &1/2 which are notorious for requiring pliers to open. Pfft. Easy peezey. Tried on bottled water..same result.

Used the small one to open a pop top can of beer. Presto. Pesky can of tuna with a pop top? No problem, quick and easy.

Opened a can of spam, beenee weinees.....this thing makes quick work of what otherwise was nail busting..start it then roll it along and the can peels right open.

74 year old arthritic recycled teenager speaking here. Works great !

CheersI recently purchased the 5-Pack Bottle Opener Jar Opener for Weak Hands, and I couldn't be more satisfied with this product! As someone with arthritis, I often struggle with opening jars and bottles, but these openers have made my life much easier. It is designed to tackle different types of lids and caps, ensuring I have the right tool for any job. They are lightweight yet sturdy, and the ergonomic handles provide a comfortable grip, reducing the strain on my hands.
One of the best features is the ease of use. I no longer have to ask for help to open a jar or bottle. The openers work quickly and efficiently, saving me both time and frustration. The compact size makes them easy to store in my kitchen drawer without taking up much space.
The build quality is excellent, and they feel durable enough to last for years. I highly recommend this 5-pack Bottle Opener Jar Opener for anyone with weak hands or wanting a reliable, versatile toolset in their kitchen. It's a game-changer!This has been a game changer for me and my husband, our hands aren’t as strong as they were. They make some of these jar lids very tight! They’re easy to use, store and function very well!Works great on small to medium, but slightly more difficult on large lids. You need 2 hands to maintain pressure without being able to keep jar bellow from moving. The silicone mats and 2 other openers are nice.Well, like everything about this product it really helps me because my hands are not what they used to be so it really helps Out a bunch!I bought this because I couldnt open my pop.it was easy to use once you put it over the lid 'then you push down and grasp the handle and turn it.the lid comes off.AS I AM GETTING OLDER, MY HAND STRENGTH IS NOT WHAT IT USED TO BE. THESE HELP!I should have found this and got it sooner. It has tools for everything in the box. Love the aqua blue color!
reviews_1s:
First of all the bottle opener and the tab opener are okay although you have to kind of lift the tab yourself first to even get it to work. But the big multi-size jar opener I have yet to find a jar that I can open with it. It's too slick it just slides around I have not been able to open one single jar with it. I did my research I read all that reviews so a lot of people finding it works but not me not one time!The rubber is too slick to grab hold of any bottle lid. Even the rubber disks are not made in a way that grips jars or bottles. Iv tried all of the items and cannot get any bottles or jars open. Bummer - I had high hopes.The largest piece does not help at all. The bottle cap opener works fine. Do not waste your money.. I will now buy the XOX brand v shaped opener - it actually works.I haven't been able to get this to work on 12 different items that I have tried it on.Tried opening a jar of salsa, harder on the hands to position on jar. Could not maneuver it.The reason customers buy jab opener is because the jar is difficult to open. A jar of Ghee from Costco is known for extremely difficult to open before they recently changed to Kirkland. This jar a has a nice look and appears to have many tools that comes with. However, the jar opener is made of mostly plastic and it breaks. Not the jar covers but the jar opener itself as it does not hold the force and slip from the metal surface of the jar lip. Too bad it broke after the refundable windows and it should have request for refund. Lastly, I purchased another jar opener from another brand and vendor. Alert.. do not buy list.I don’t like the product because it doesn’t open pickle jars which why I ordered. Not what I expected.It did not help to remove the screw top from a wine bottle.The only good functional part is the cork screw. The plastic on the jar opener slips. The pads are too flimsy and don’t grip.This only works if you have large hands and a good grip,

In which case you don’t need this product.

Total waste
